items.name_en: Dior 1:1 Authentic Counter Top Imported Original Sheepskin Backpack, Medium Dior Caro Backpack Black Sheepskin Oversized Houndstooth
items.name_cn:
Dior 1:1 Authentic Counter Top Imported Original Sheepskin Backpack, Medium Dior Caro Backpack Black Sheepskin Oversized Houndstooth
Product Info
This Dior Caro Backpack is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer Collection, showcasing a fashionable and elegant style. Crafted from black sheepskin, it features oversized houndstooth quilting for a touch of class. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD logo. Inside, there is a spacious drawstring main compartment, and two small flap pockets for various daily essentials. The medium size comes with gold-finish handles and an adjustable shoulder strap for added comfort.
Main: Sheepskin, Lining: Cowhide
Front features CD logo flap and drawstring closure
Dimensions: 23√ó26.7√ó12.5cm
Style No.: 6301

items.name_en: Exclusive Real Photos M24996 Screen Print (Surfing) This Christopher Medium Backpack uses Monogram Surfin' canvas inspired by Pharrell Williams, interpreting the inspiration of a rucksack. Surfboards and floral elements construct an intricate overlapping pattern, highlighting a retro atmosphere with vibrant tones. The close-fitting silhouette includes ample space, with compartments and side pockets. Dimensions: 38x44x12.5cm
